items.evidenceExcerpt: ANU's international application page lists policy guidance for Semester 1 general 2026-12-15, Crawford 2026-10-31; Semester 2 general 2027-05-15, Crawford 2027-04-15. It says applications are now open but publishes no exact opening date, and warns that application deadlines for programs with additional selection criteria may vary. These dates are not assigned to individual programmes without programme-specific confirmation.
